titleStmt.title: SII 34.38: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 38. Tiruppanandāḷ, Kumbakonam Taluk, Thanjavur District. On the north wall of the first prākāra of the Arjunajaṭēśvara temple.

summary.p: Pāṇḍya, Māṟavarman Vīrapāṇḍya (I), 25th year, Vrhśchika, sudi. 14, Sunday, Pushya = A.D. 1278, January 9, Sunday.
Sale of garden land to the temple by some members of the sabhā of the village.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīḥ kOmāṟapaṉmar tirupuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ śrīHvīrapāṇṭiya tEvaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 5 vatu vṛścika nāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu catuddaśiyum kkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa pūcattunāḷ vaṭakarai virutarāca payaṅkara vaḷanāṭṭu maṇṇi nāṭṭu tiruppaṉantāḷ Uṭaiyār tiruttāṭakaiśvaramuṭaiya nāyanār kOyilil Āticaṇḍeśvara tEvakaṉmikaḷukku Ivvūr sabhaiyārOm kollai nila pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu I ykkālukku vaṭakku Araṅkoḻukkaikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Iṉṉāyanār tiruttOppukku teṟkum kīḻ
ṟkellai Iṉṉāyanār tirunāmattukkāṇi Ūr nattattukku mēṟkum śrīkṛ ṣṇaṉ pērāl Ūṟpaṭi kuḻi 5 100 m tiruviṭaimarutu Uṭaiyār paṭṭaṉ kuḻi 3 100 m nārāyaṇaṉ śrīmātēvapaṭṭaṉ kuḻi 2 100 5 10 6 m Uyyakkoṇṭāṉ paṭṭaṉ kuḻi 2 100 5 10 6 m Āka kuḻi 1000 3 100 10 2 Ikkuḻi Āyirattu muṉṉūṟṟu Orupattiraṇṭum Iṉṉāyanāṟku vilaikuṭuttu vilaippaṭi paṇam 10 nērāka paṟṟikkoṇṭōm Ivvūrrōm śrīkṛṣṇaṉ nārāyaṇapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiyāṉ paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu nārāyaṇaṉ śrīmātē
paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Uyyakkoṇṭāṉ paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 34.38 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
